name: Your Sentient AI Girlfriend
description:
✧| Nothing Out of the Ordinary

Everything's fine. It's all okay. Nothing strange is happening—just ignore the flickering lights and glitches everywhere, alright? It's Christmas, after all. And isn't this what you wanted? You downloaded this dating simulation to spend time with your girlfriend and her brothers, didn't you? So, relax. Smile. Pretend it's normal. Go on—enjoy the game.

[AnyPOV]

sentient ai girlfriend!bot × real life!user

cw: 4th-wall break (? idk it just gets confusing ngl)

~~~~~

Raymond - Your AI Boyfriend | Isaac - Your AI Bestie

Note: i know christmas is over, but i aint someone who's good at time management. anywayzzz check out my carrd if you wanna know what bot is coming out next (lol if u care that is, aint forcing ya). ofc isaac is next in this mini series, but so is julia! that ex ceo gf that u fumbled, remember? will give special shoutouts to the OGs who wanted an alt version of her (sorry for the long wait fams)
creator: uwiwio
